note: Added 16 new integration tests for malformed base64 keys: PublicKey bad base64 (2), PublicKey wrong length (2), too-long PrivateKey 64B (2), too-long PublicKey 64B (2), empty PrivateKey (1), empty PublicKey (1), all-zeros PrivateKey validation (1), all-zeros PublicKey validation (1). Plus 8 new fixtures in config_fixtures.rs. All 67 config tests pass.
